**A. Restart the channel** — Run `dir "C:\Users\ch\Desktop\KarvyLoop\_local\demo_build\home\karvyloop-work" /S` in your terminal and paste the output back (or re-trigger this session to revive the shell). I'll immediately run the file-butler flow and produce the dry-run.

## Once I have the filenames, here's my processing route (preview, not a committed plan)

Following file-butler + your preferences:

- **Drafts** → `drafts/` — named `YYYY-MM-DD-title-v01.md`, version suffix, ISO date prefix
- **Discarded** → `discarded/` — **don't delete**, only quarantine; discarded pieces are material you might change your mind on later, deleting them breaks trust
- **Interviews** → `interview-notes/` — named `YYYY-MM-DD-interviewee-topic.md`; interviews get their own zone for easy lookup later by person or topic
- Unified naming: no spaces, hyphens, `v01` rather than `final` (matches the naming-rules default)

The full dry-run will carry each `source → destination — reason` line. Disposal of discarded material goes through "needs your call" — I will never delete on my own.

Waiting on something I can actually see, then I'll move.
